title: Test display behavior with a table
scenario: Admin screens and audit messages render percentage values for humans. Formatting is public behavior, not a throwaway detail.
instructions: Implement Display for Percentage and add a table-driven test for 0%, 50%, and 100%, preserving the existing range tests.

hints.body: Formatting valid Percentage values is infallible.
Reuse TryFrom in tests instead of constructing the private field.
Compare the final String with the expected text.

completionExplanation: Display behavior is covered by the same compact table style as validation behavior, so UI and audit text stay predictable.
